ddls:
CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the political committee */,
  "committee_type" TEXT /* Type of committee (e.g., Super PAC, Candidate Committee) */,
  "filing_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of required financial reports (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the committee (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee contact person */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the committee's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the committee's address (if any) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the committee is registered */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code of the committee's address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the committee's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the committee was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the committee information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact person */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the contact (if any) */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* Title prefix for the contact (e.g., Mr., Ms.) */,
  "suffix" TEXT /* Title suffix for the contact (e.g., Jr., Sr.) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the contact's address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the contact's address (if any) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the contact's address */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code of the contact's address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the contact's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the contact was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the contact information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., contribution, expenditure, refund) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the transaction (e.g., vendor, other committee) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, credit card) */,
  "schedule_c_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Schedule C for detailed reporting */,
  "receipt_type" TEXT /* Type of receipt (e.g., contribution, refund) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the transaction was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the transaction information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule (e.g., Schedule A, Schedule C) */,
  "schedule_description" TEXT /* Description of what the schedule covers */,
  "reporting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the schedule (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the schedule information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original transaction */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date when the refund was processed */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount of the refund */,
  "original_transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original transaction being refunded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund (e.g., duplicate payment, error) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the refund was processed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the refund information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refunds_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee submitting the report */,
  "report_uid" TEXT /* Unique ID for the report generated by the system */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Date the report was reviewed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated report */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction included in the report */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money involved in the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., contribution, expenditure, refund) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report detail was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report detail information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reporting ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, committee member, auditor) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details regarding the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicator if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refund_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund request */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee making the request */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount requested for refund */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the request information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refund_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refund_requests_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee making the expenditure */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount spent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expenditure (e.g., advertising, event) */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the expenditure was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the expenditure information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the audit trail entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user, auditor) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
